THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JENKINS, TERENCE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MEHER, PATEL DBA DRAKE HOTEL MOHSIN, PATEL DBA DRAKE HOTEL PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT MOHSIN PATEL IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
